steps.title: Identify the parallel meaning signal
steps.content: The sentence uses not only ______ but also illuminate. Since "illuminate" means to reveal or clarify, the blank needs a verb that expresses how paleontologists perceive or identify steps in hominid evolution — a parallel mental act of discovery.

steps.title: Test each choice against the parallel structure
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'yield': means to produce or give forth — the fossil does not yield steps by itself; paleontologists must perceive them. ✗
  • Choice B — 'exploit': means to take advantage of — this implies opportunistic use of steps, not the act of recognizing them. ✗
  • Choice C — 'discern': means to perceive or identify through careful study — paleontologists use the fossil to make out evolutionary steps, directly matching the parallel with "illuminate." ✓
  • Choice D — 'prioritize': means to rank as more important — the passage says nothing about ranking steps; it is about recognizing them. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
